text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the river...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Did I mess up the equation? No, there's no
way. That must mean it's the data that's...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What do you want? This has got nothing to do
with—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Actually... the problem might be that I don't have
enough data. Hey, get your ass over here. I've got
a question for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing some simulations based on my heart
rate data, but I'm not getting the results I want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur proceeds to expand on her
mathematical formulas in great detail, but it all
goes over my head...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, forget it. I'm giving up on this approach. It's
no good.
choice_data_list: Maybe you should redo the formulas?
But good things come to those who persist.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no crap. What else do you think I was
going to do? That's what I meant by giving up on
this approach.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just because I can't prove my formula doesn't
mean I'm gonna leave it half-finished.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, I'm not gonna bury my head in the
sand if it still doesn't work after that, but I know
my math's good, so I'm not giving up yet. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur changes gears in a flash and walks off,
her tablet in hand. I have no doubt that her
persistence will get her the results she wants.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you saying I haven't tested my math
enough times? I've crunched the numbers more
times than you can believe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Besides, blindly chasing after results just because you think there's a possibility something might come out of it is stu—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Maybe the conditions I applied to my
trials weren't thorough enough. I should input the
data and run the numbers again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch Air Shakur for a while after that, and her
formula seems to produce a satisfactory answer in
the end.
